name: Allowlisted Local Knowledge Vault Bridge
objective: Define an explicit-path allowlist, secret exclusion, and write-diff approval boundary for future local knowledge workflows.
non_goals: No Vault indexing, sync, shell, MCP, network, external directory access, write, or daemon.
inputs: Future customer-approved exact local paths and exclusion rules.
outputs: Future read-only contract and future write-diff approval design.
excluded_patterns: Knowledge-base and repository-context patterns need separate source and scope evidence.
known_gaps: The proposal is locked and does not read a real Vault or external directory.
